question: How can I reset my password?
answer: Click on the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a password reset link within 2 minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

question: How do I change my email address?
answer: Go to Account Settings > Profile. Click 'Edit' next to your email address, enter your new email, and verify it using the code sent to your new inbox.

question: How do I delete my account?
answer: To permanently delete your account, navigate to Settings > Privacy & Security, scroll to the bottom, and click 'Delete Account'. Please note this action cannot be undone and all data will be lost.

question: Can I merge two accounts?
answer: Currently, we do not support merging accounts automatically. Please contact our support team, and we can manually migrate your data from one account to the other.

question: How do I update my payment method?
answer: Go to Settings > Billing. Click on 'Payment Methods' to add a new credit card or PayPal account. You can set the new method as your default for future invoices.

question: Where can I find my past invoices?
answer: All past invoices are available in the Billing section under 'Invoice History'. You can download them as PDFs at any time.

question: How do I cancel my subscription?
answer: You can cancel your subscription by going to Settings > Billing > Plan Details and clicking 'Cancel Subscription'. You will have access to your premium features until the end of the current billing cycle.

question: Do you offer refunds?
answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all annual plans. Monthly plans are non-refundable, but you can cancel anytime to prevent future charges.

question: What happens when my free trial ends?
answer: When your 14-day free trial ends, your account will automatically be downgraded to the free tier unless you add a payment method and select a premium plan.

question: Do you offer discounts for non-profits or students?
answer: Yes, we offer a 50% discount for registered non-profits and students. Please contact our support team from your organizational or .edu email address to apply.

question: How do I enable two-factor authentication (2FA)?
answer: Go to Settings > Security. Click 'Enable 2FA' and follow the prompts to link your authenticator app (like Google Authenticator or Authy) using the provided QR code.

question: Is my data encrypted?
answer: Yes, all data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.3 and at rest using AES-256 encryption. We adhere to industry-standard security practices.

question: Are you GDPR compliant?
answer: Yes, we are fully GDPR and CCPA compliant. You can request a data export or data deletion at any time from your Privacy Settings.

question: How do I log out of all devices?
answer: If you suspect unauthorized access, go to Settings > Security and click 'Log out of all active sessions'. This will instantly terminate access on all browsers and devices.

question: How do I install the desktop app?
answer: You can download the Windows or macOS desktop app from our downloads page. Run the installer, and follow the on-screen instructions to set it up.

question: What are the system requirements?
answer: Our application requires Windows 10/11 or macOS 11+, at least 4GB of RAM, and 500MB of free disk space. A stable internet connection is required for syncing.

question: Can I use the app offline?
answer: Yes, the desktop and mobile apps have an offline mode. You can view and edit your data, and changes will automatically sync to the cloud the next time you connect to the internet.

question: How do I change the theme to Dark Mode?
answer: Click on your profile picture in the top right corner, select 'Preferences', and under 'Appearance', choose 'Dark Mode'. You can also set it to follow your system settings.

question: Is there a limit to how many projects I can create?
answer: Free accounts are limited to 3 active projects. Pro and Enterprise accounts can create an unlimited number of projects.

question: How do I share a project with a team member?
answer: Open the project, click the 'Share' button in the top right corner, and enter the email address of your team member. You can assign them 'Viewer' or 'Editor' permissions.

question: The app keeps crashing on startup. What should I do?
answer: Try clearing your application cache by going to Help > Troubleshooting > Clear Cache. If the issue persists, completely uninstall the app, restart your computer, and reinstall the latest version.

question: Why are my files not syncing?
answer: Check your internet connection. If you are online, look for the sync icon in the bottom right corner. If it's red, hover over it to see the error message. You can try forcing a sync by clicking 'Sync Now' in the file menu.

question: I forgot my password and am not receiving the reset email.
answer: Please check your spam/junk folder and ensure you typed the email address correctly. If your company uses a strict firewall, ask your IT department to whitelist our email domain.

question: Why is the website loading so slowly?
answer: We might be experiencing high traffic or a temporary server degradation. You can check our real-time status page at status.ourdomain.com. Alternatively, try clearing your browser cache or disabling extensions.

question: Do you have a public API?
answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive REST API for Pro and Enterprise users. You can find the full API documentation and endpoint references at developer.ourdomain.com.

question: How do I generate an API key?
answer: Go to Settings > Developer Options. Click 'Generate New API Key'. Keep this key secret, as it provides full access to your account data. You can revoke it at any time.

question: What is the API rate limit?
answer: The standard API rate limit is 1,000 requests per minute per IP address. If you need a higher limit, please contact our enterprise sales team.

question: Do you support Webhooks?
answer: Yes, you can configure webhooks in the Developer Options section to receive real-time HTTP POST payloads when specific events occur in your account.

question: Is there a mobile app available?
answer: Yes, our mobile app is available for both iOS (App Store) and Android (Google Play Store). Search for our company name to download it for free.

question: Do you integrate with Slack or Microsoft Teams?
answer: Yes, we have native integrations for both Slack and Microsoft Teams. You can install them from the 'Integrations' tab in your workspace settings to receive notifications directly in your chat channels.

question: How do I connect my account to Google Drive?
answer: Go to Settings > Integrations, find Google Drive in the list, and click 'Connect'. You'll be prompted to authorize access via Google OAuth.

question: Can I export my data to Excel or CSV?
answer: Yes, you can export most tables and reports. Look for the 'Export' button (usually an arrow icon pointing down) in the top right corner of the data view and select CSV or Excel format.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach us by clicking the 'Help' widget in the bottom right corner of the app, or by emailing support@ourcompany.com. Live chat is available for Pro users during business hours.

question: What browsers do you support?
answer: We support the latest versions of Google Chrome, Mozilla Firefox, Safari, and Microsoft Edge. Internet Explorer is not supported.

question: Is Single Sign-On (SSO) supported?
answer: Yes, SAML-based Single Sign-On (SSO) is available on our Enterprise plan. We support Okta, Azure AD, OneLogin, and custom SAML identity providers.

question: Can I recover a deleted project?
answer: Yes, deleted projects remain in the 'Trash' folder for 30 days before being permanently purged. You can restore them from there during that window.

question: Why was my credit card declined?
answer: Credit cards can be declined for various reasons, including insufficient funds, expired cards, or fraud prevention blocks by your bank. Please contact your bank to authorize the charge, or try a different payment method.

question: How do I change my billing currency?
answer: Currently, all invoices are billed in USD. We do not support local currency billing at this time.

question: What is a workspace?
answer: A workspace is a shared environment where your team can collaborate on projects. You can be a member of multiple workspaces and switch between them using the dropdown menu in the top left.

question: How do I transfer ownership of a workspace?
answer: The current owner can transfer ownership by going to Workspace Settings > Members, finding the user they want to make the owner, clicking the three dots next to their name, and selecting 'Transfer Ownership'.
